pi_items.source: setup_woocommerce.sh line 239: wp wc product create --name="Merino Wool Sweater"; confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 17,23,27 and export_result.sh line 39
setup_woocommerce.sh line 238: wp wc product create --name="Slim Fit Denim Jeans"; confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 18,24,28 and export_result.sh line 40
setup_woocommerce.sh line 237: wp wc product create --name="Organic Cotton T-Shirt"; confirmed in export_result.sh line 41

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on three synthetic WooCommerce products created via WP-CLI during environment initialization: (1) Merino Wool Sweater - priced at $89.99 with SKU MWS-GRY-L, created with 120 stock units; (2) Slim Fit Denim Jeans - priced at $59.99 with SKU SFDJ-BLU-32, created with 200 stock units; (3) Organic Cotton T-Shirt - priced at $24.99 with SKU OCT-BLK-M, created with 500 stock units and used as a control product. The task verifies catalog sorting by checking that the sweater and jeans have menu_order values less than 0 and that the sweater's value is less than the jeans' value, with a total possible score of 100 points.
